multi-feed-digest.note: Failures caused by devstral-small tool-calling degeneration (model produces massive text-only responses with no tool calls). When model cooperates, scores 100.

changes_made: Rewrote SKILL.md with SLM-optimized structure: explicit JSON templates, topic assignment rules, numbered extraction rules
Embedded RSS feed URLs in description field so model has them in system prompt even without loading skill
Bundled scripts/parse_rss.py for XML→JSON parsing with correct date handling and sorting
Bundled scripts/fetch_digest.py for complete multi-feed fetch+parse+digest pipeline in one command
Added quick reference table mapping tasks to exact commands
Reduced SKILL.md to ~80 lines with high information density
key_findings: devstral-small reliably handles parse-rss and summarize-articles without loading the skill
multi-feed-digest requires skill loading for feed URLs; model loads skill ~60% of the time
When model degenerates, it generates massive text-only responses with repetitive plans but no tool calls
Bundled fetch_digest.py eliminates the need for multi-step curl+parse workflow, improving success rate from 0% to ~60%
parse-rss date ordering errors occur when model writes its own parser instead of using bundled script
